planning_request.user_request: Proceed to the next documented product step: prepare concrete content specifications for mandatory Training Sloop lessons L01–L05 and a draft lesson-level domain validation registry. This is planning/documentation only; do not implement code. Reconcile the documents with PRD v0.3 sections 7.2.1, 8.0, 8.3, 10 and 12. Return the minimal document structure, required fields, lesson-specific observable objectives/checkpoints/recovery semantics, and validation-record coverage without inventing sailing thresholds or claiming real navigational safety.
planning_request.desired_outcome: A robust, implementer-ready but domain-validation-gated lesson specification package: one document for all five lesson contracts plus a machine-readable validation registry draft. The content must preserve Sloop-only MVP, local-only replay, virtual water, non-certification, deterministic contract, and safety-first scoring.
known_context: MVP is desktop-first browser, virtual water, training-sloop-v1 only, mandatory L01-L05.
L01 relative wind/course; L02 main/jib trim; L03 gust/wave/reef; L04 current correction; L05 tide/depth/visibility.
All thresholds, polars, draft, safety limits, scoring weights and mastery thresholds are unvalidated simulation assumptions until a lesson-level validation record is approved.
Required lesson contract fields are enumerated in PRD §7.2.1. Determinism is governed by §8.3. Domain validation and P1 release gates are §12.
constraints: Documentation only. No code, Git, deployment, API calls, credential handling, or external network research.
Do not invent numeric values, safety limits, performance polars, real weather rules, or certification claims.
Use semantic pass/fail/recovery states and validation_record_ids; phrase unapproved claims as assumptions requiring disposition.
Korea coastal names and live/realtime navigation data remain out of these MVP lesson documents.
current_architecture: Documentation-only project; no implementation or repository exists.
previous_review_findings: PRD v0.3 requires each lesson to declare contract fields and validation_record_id; release is blocked for lessons whose record is rejected or unapproved.
